## Problem Statement
A clear description of what problem you're trying to solve.
Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Describe your use case and how this feature would help.

## Example Code
```python
# If possible, show how you'd like to use this feature
import tenro

# Your proposed API usage
```

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request.
